scene.message: Brown: Huh?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Heh.{wait_fr:21} Cages suit{nl} monkeys well...{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Ugh...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: That's for later!{nl} Let's get them out!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Oh... okay...{nl} then anyway...{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: ...{wait_fr:21}Who's there?{waitkey}{ret}
Officer: ...{wait_fr:21}You can't{nl} do that.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Something's wrong!{nl} Inaba — these guys...!{waitkey}{ret}
Inspector: Death penalty{nl} for dangerous criminals.{waitkey}{ret}
Used the "Cell Key"...{waitkey}{ret}
